articles.title: Who’s the most active crypto trader in the US Congress?
articles.description: According to a recent CNBC analysis, eight of the highest-ranked politicians in the US or their immediate family have traded crypto over the past year–with bets spanning from $1,000 to $100,000. Altogether seven Republicans disclosed buying or selling crypto, including Senator Pat Toomey of Pennsylvania.
